response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video for structure. Scene 1 (00:00-03:21) is intro talk. Scene 2 (03:21-04:59) is the performance. 2. Identified the song 'おこちゃま戦争' from the on-screen text during the performance. 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'おこちゃま戦争' by Giga-P and Reol. 4. Obtained the full lyrics and the English translation. 5. Mapped the scenes and generated the final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video begins with an introductory talk segment featuring a VTuber, followed by a collaborative performance of the song "Okochama Sensou".

scenes.description: The main VTuber introduces the segment and talks to the audience. No vocal music is playing.
Four VTubers perform the song 'Okochama Sensou' (Childish War). On-screen text identifies the song.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Long ago, in a time even further back
There lived a pair of good friends, a pair of nobles
(Ry, and so on...)
"Do it properly!"
The butler calls, "Take your seats, ready, set, go!"
With knife and fork in hand, we offer our counterattack
Because we are nobles
Splendid, splendid nobles, you see
Bow down, commoners, and look at the difference
Between you and us, Viceroy
Hey, wait, wait, are you doing it selfishly again?
Putting on a bluff that looks like it can be seen through
Yes, yes, yes, yes
As you command, older brother (lol)
Ah, it's infuriating, it's truly infuriating
That arrogant attitude toward your older brother
Let the battle cry, the gong, ring out
War has broken out, a declaration of war
Playing pranks, egging each other on
Look, look, with an inflammatory style
If you buy it at a 'great sale', it's your loss
Thanks for your patronage always
(Yeah!)
With clumsy drawers and provoking tactics, I decide
To show my dignity to my brother, that's it
Sparks fly, eyes meet, in the eyes of the loser
Eat this! I am the rulebook
I'm not a coward, I'm not scared
Just a little bit lacking in courage, that's all
Come on, come on, everyone, may I have your hands?
Of course, completely composed
Born with status and
A sparkling life begins
Yes, refutation, yes, refutation, yes, refutation
I'll take the victory, V-sign
Yeah
Yes, yes, yes, yes
Well done, good job
Ah, it's infuriating, it's truly infuriating
Your insolent talk directed at me
I'll show you something special
Retaliation, punishment, provocation
Teasing, one step ahead
I'll take the chance, in that stance
Oh no, a fatal miss, oops
Too bad for you, it's your loss
Yes!
But you, only you
(Sei ya, to ya, to, ya, ha)
Are the only rival worthy of me
(Sei ya, to ya, to, ya, ha)
Falling or being composed
(U ha, sei ya, ya, sei ha)
It throws off my rhythm, you see
Tonight, with you, yai yai yai yai
(Usually, older brother is always so wishy-washy, so I'm taking the initiative for your share too. You should be a little more grateful.)
(You're older, yet you're completely unreliable, it's just 'older brother this, older brother that'. From today on, I am the older brother, that's decided. Yes, decided!)
(You're always going out of control on your own, so I have no choice but to clean up after you, right? And I'm not a coward, I'm just cautious. The maids and the butler were saying that too. Seriously, calm down a little!)
(Oh, shut up!!)
Ah, it's infuriating, it's truly infuriating
Zip your mouth shut about your complaints
Let the battle cry, the gong, ring out
The next generation's emperor is "me" - "me"
Playing pranks, egging each other on
Look, look, with an inflammatory style
I'll take everything from one to a hundred
Thanks for your patronage always, it's your loss...
Is this an unexpected draw?
Eh?!
